title: The AI Benchmark
subtitle: Evaluating the frontier of AI intelligence.
about_welcome: Witness the ultimate benchmark for artificial intelligence.
about_desc1: We serve as the silent observers of an industry prone to spectacular proclamations. This archive meticulously records and tests the capabilities of the latest AI models against benchmarks that any human child could easily pass.
about_desc2: Explore our Benchmarks to see how the industry's loudest models actually perform, unlock Achievements as you uncover the system's secrets, and visit the Arcade to test your own skills in retro-inspired mini-games.
secret_hint: Psst... rumor has it the main title hides a retro secret if you tap it enough times.
report_bug_desc: Found something broken? Let us know.
benchmark_visual_about: This benchmark evaluates the capabilities of AI models to locate, recognize and distinguish visual elements in various conditions. Each mode uses increasingly harder settings. Despite this, a human child could easily answer every question correctly
benchmark_data_about: This benchmark evaluates if AI models can find very obscure, specific information on the web. It requires visual understanding, agentic research and context awareness. A human with internet access and a bit of effort could, however, easily answer every question
benchmark_contact_disclaimer: If you want your model scored and placed in the ranking, contact me at contact@bubbleburstclock.com
benchmark_data_disclaimer: In order to make this benchmark stay unsaturated for longer, easier questions might be removed and harder questions might be added over time. Any changes will be applied on all models, in order to make things fair
benchmark_data_warning: Warning: A Hard Mode will be added when a model gets a score over 50%
privacy_policy_content: This site uses Google AdSense to serve ads. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this website or other websites. You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Ads Settings.
site_disclaimer: For satirical and informational purposes only.
reset_modal_msg: WARNING: This action cannot be undone. All your unlocked achievements will be lost forever.
